}}} '''Properties:'''
≫ {{{properties|Consumable / Liquid / Reactive}}} ≪

Description

Velocity-Neon is a liquid with anomalous properties. Velocity-Neon has speed-altering properties, accelerating other objects at a heavily increased rate when they come into contact with this substance. A smoother motion between molecules was observed when the substance was poured on an object. It was concluded that the anomalous properties of energy in the Backrooms influenced this liquid heavily. Leading to Velocity-Neon altering the way molecules interacted around it and thus increase the speed of an object dramatically. Additionally, Velocity-Neon gives off light. The light itself is neon colored, being either bright blue, purple, or pink. Strangely, the light emitted from Velocity-Neon never flickers or fades, making it a viable light source. {{Simple Image Block |image=Velcoty neon.png |width=200px |caption=Velocity Neon found in a bottle. |imagecellstyle=border: 1px solid #04d9ff; background: rgba(20, 20, 20, 0.1); padding: 30px; margin-left: 16px; |captioncellstyle=border: 1px solid #04d9ff; background: rgba(20, 20, 20, 0.1); margin-left: 16px;}} Other liquids or gases have been known to interact oddly with Velocity-Neon. If there is an electrical current going through the liquid, it will be amplified, creating bright flashes and loud noises. Electricity will arc through the air, striking the objects or living beings that are the closest to this electrical hazard. All items or beings struck by this object will travel much faster than usual before the effects of the lightning set in and kill or damage the item or being in question. If any liquid comes into contact with Velocity-Neon, the solution created would be diluted, dulling the effects of the serum.





Usage

There are multiple ways for one to use Velocity-Neon listed below.

'''Ingesting''': Consuming Velocity-Neon haphazardly is not recommended. In the event that the wanderer ''does'' consume Velocity-Neon in unregulated quantities, the wanderer's movements be quickened, along with other bodily systems. However, it has been noted that the structure of a wanderer's body is not strong enough to endure such strenuous effects. The wanderer's heart will pump at an increasingly alarming pace, leading to blackouts and, in some cases, death. The thinking processes of a wanderer are not affected, as Velocity-Neon does not usually affect mental or psychological properties.

'''Injection''': If done by a professional, this method may have benefits for the wanderer. Injecting drops of Velocity-Neon into the wanderer's body over time is encouraged, allowing the wanderer to adapt to the effects of the liquid. The safest place to administer it is near the arms, as far away from vital organs as possible. Injecting it near vital organs may cause heart failure or the ribs crushing themselves against the lungs.

If the procedure is a success, the wanderer will move quicker and be able to outrun certain entities with ease. The wanderer's metabolism and respiration rate may quicken as well. There is only one downside to this—every 4 months or so, the wanderer will experience immense pain, which is followed by loss of consciousness for about 2 days. It is believed to be the result of the overloading of bodily processes by the Velocity-Neon.

'''Rubbing/Coating Objects''': Rubbing or coating objects with Velocity-Neon is the safest way to use the liquid. The object will move faster for a long period of time. Since Velocity-Neon evaporates at an extremely sluggish rate, the effect it has on the object will linger for a long period of time. This is usually done by wanderers on the base of their footwear to slightly increase their running speed. Coating Velocity Neon on objects can also help to push or move them with less force.

Locations

Velocity-Neon is commonly found leaking from appliances that are turned on for a very long span of time. Examples of such appliances are the lights of [[Level 0]] and the electricity stations of [[Level 3]]. Research conducted has found that the buildup and long-term release of electricity or energy causes a shift in the molecular structure of normal liquid. This leads to the formation of Velocity-Neon. However, it is still unknown why the liquid gives off a neon-colored light.

Since energy can be found almost anywhere in the Backrooms, especially in strange forms, Velocity-Neon is able to be found nearly everywhere. Exceptions are given to levels that are devoid of color, life, or energy, such as [[the Void]].

Variants

There is only one variation of Velocity-Neon, which is Velocity-Void. This variant of Velocity-Neon is extremely dangerous and not to be used by wanderers in any form. Wanderers should refrain from making contact with the liquid due to its dangerous properties.

Velocity-Void is a liquid formed when an extreme amount of energy is output onto normal liquids such as water or Carpet Fluid. The type of energy that usually triggers the formation of Velocity-Void must be powerful and, in most cases, reality-bending. As such, most levels with cracks or fissures leading to [[The Void]] have pools of Velocity-Void forming in them.

In summary, Velocity-Void is an enhanced version of Velocity-Neon. However, Velocity-Void increases the speed of a moving object so fast that the wanderer or object it is used on glitches through many parts of the Backrooms, all in the span of a second. This is known as Quantum Fissuring. This term is used to describe the object or wanderer teleporting through many levels of the Backrooms at once. It is speculated that the object or wanderer would accelerate at an uncontrollable pace, leading to the fabric of reality, or in this case [[Backrooms Wiki|unreality]], to be torn. As such, levels that are hotspots for Velocity-Void pool formation are extremely unstable.
